parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Skava Integration - Order Replaced Completed

box "Skava AWS" #F5F5F5
participant "Skava Event\nOrchestration" as SEO
end box

box "Kafka" #E0F2F1
collections "Topics" as Topics
end box

box "YL Services" #E8EAF6
participant "Order Sync Service" as OSS
end box

database "Legacy DB" as LDB

SEO -> Topics : 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate Topics

== Async ==

Topics -> OSS : 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
deactivate Topics
activate OSS

OSS -> LDB : 3 Update order status in legacy db
activate LDB
LDB --> OSS : 4 Response/Order ID
deactivate LDB

OSS -> Topics : 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate OSS
activate Topics

== Async ==

Topics -> SEO : 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate Topics
activate SEO
deactivate SEO

@enduml
```
